features: Super soft makeup brushes set professional includes everything you need for gorgeously defined looks, with six luxe face brushes and six luxe eye brushes.
The professional-grade brushes have cruelty-free, vegan-friendly fibres that are gentle on sensitive skin when you require the best premium makeup brush set.

Luxuriously soft, silky smooth, high-density fibres designed and crafted by industry experts, this set includes everything you need for perfect results every time, for you or as a makeup brush set gift.
Brush fibres developed and chosen for high-performance application of various beauty makeup.
Makeup artist designed and handcrafted the number one professional Luxfibre brushes loved and recommended by thousands of customers.
description: Product Description Luxury Professional Makeup Brushes Stylish and elegant makeup brush sets crafted for the beauty enthusiast & the professional makeup artist. Vegan Friendly & Hypoallergenic makeup brushes Oscar Charles Brushes loved by Professional Makeup Artists Either you are a professional makeup artist or a beauty enthusiast, you will love the Oscar Charles vegan-friendly Luxfiber which will apply your makeup with perfection and with ease. The brush fibres are carefully chosen to produce flawless results for blush, creams, liquids, and powders. Professional Quality You Can Trust The best professional-grade fibres that pick up and apply the correct amount of makeup. Designed and handcrafted by industry experts, the brushes have luxurious soft fibres that will not shed. High end finished wooden brush handles coated with multiple paint layers. Achieve the perfect look as each brush is full-sized to its appropriate intended purpose. Who Will You Surprise? The perfect present for you or a loved one, delivered in a stylish and beautiful gift box Cruelty Free & Vegan Friendly Oscar Charles Vegan Brushes are made from synthetic Luxfiber. As the fibres are synthetic, they are naturally hypoallergenic and suitable for sensitive skin. Professional Luxe Makeup Brushes Comprehensive brush set with all sizes and shapes of brushes to sculpture your makeup. For beautiful and flawless blending, shading and highlighting.
